channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Motorola Razr Plus could beat the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 in 3 key ways, according to new benchmarks
item.description: The Motorola Razr Plus could be a powerful rival to the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7, if new specs rumors are anything to go by.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Sony hikes PlayStation 5 console prices for Europe, UK and Australia citing economic turmoil
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Sony said it will raise prices starting Monday for some PlayStation 5 video game consoles in Europe, Australia and New Zealand, citing global economic turmoil.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 4-legged hydrogen-powered robot you can actually ride
item.description: Kawasaki's CORLEO is a hydrogen-powered, AI-driven rideable robot. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reports on this new way of thinking about off-road transportation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meta faces historic antitrust trial that could force it to break off Instagram, WhatsApp
item.description: Meta Platforms Inc. faces a historic antitrust trial beginning Monday that could force the tech giant to break off Instagram and WhatsApp, startups it bought more than a decade ago that have since grown into social media powerhouses.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump FTC faces first major test with Meta trial
item.description: The Trump administration is set to take on Meta, the social media giant that owns Facebook and Instagram, in court starting Monday in a case that could stand as a key first test for President Trump’s antitrust team.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Discover Financial Services exec: GenAI isn’t yet ready for prime time
item.description: As generative AI (genAI) tools grow in adoption and sophistication, Fortune 500 companies are finding they can rely more on data to drive decisions and improve operations.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Some top tech leaders have embraced Trump. That's created a political divide in Silicon Valley
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Like many in the tech industry, Jeremy Lyons used to think of himself as a relatively apolitical guy.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Historic domes of Hagia Sophia are renovated to protect the landmark from earthquakes
item.description: Turkey has begun a new phase in sweeping restorations of the nearly 1,500-year-old Hagia Sophia in Istanbul, focusing on preserving the monument’s historic domes from the threat of earthquakes.
item.dc:creator: Robert Badendieck And Mehmet Guzel, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Musk, Tesla caught in crosshairs of Trump trade war with China
item.description: President Trump’s escalating trade war with China is putting Elon Musk and Tesla in a tight spot as the electric vehicle manufacturer faces climbing tariffs in one of its most important markets.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Japanese leader says he hopes Osaka expo will help reunite a divided world
item.description: OSAKA, Japan (AP) — Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba, speaking at Saturday's opening ceremony for the Osaka expo, expressed his hope that the event will help restore global unity in a world plagued by conflicts and trade wars.
item.dc:creator: AYAKA McGILL and MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 5 things to know about Meta’s upcoming FTC trial
item.description: Meta is set to face off against the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) on Monday in an antitrust trial that could force the social media giant to divest itself of Instagram and WhatsApp. The closely watched trial carries high stakes for Meta’s $1.3 trillion market value.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Trump’s billionaire pick to lead NASA sparks debate over the future of space exploration
item.description: Jared Isaacman, billionaire, CEO and nominee to become the next NASA administrator, faced questions on April 9, 2025, from members of the Senate Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation during his confirmation hearing for the position.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: Venmo’s dubious defaults look like a permanent privacy foul
item.description: If it weren’t for Signal, Venmo might be the most infamous app of the Trump administration—and maybe the most beloved among journalists covering this White House.
item.dc:creator: Rob Pegoraro, Fast Company

item.title: Irish privacy watchdog investigates Elon Musk's X's use of personal data to train Grok AI chatbot
item.description: Ireland’s data privacy watchdog says it’s investigating Elon Musk’s social media platform X over its use of personal data to train his artificial intelligence chatbot Grok.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Teen goes from 10 nightly seizures to zero with brain implant
item.description: The NeuroOne OneRF Ablation System is a new device with FDA-cleared technology designed for both diagnosing and treating neurological disorders in one procedure.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arm backs big data center ambitions with migration tools
item.description: Arm Holdings expects its architecture will account for half of the data center CPU market share by the end of this year, and to help achieve those goals it has launched a batch of new migration tools for application porting.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Three key federal cyber regulations to watch under Trump
item.description: GOP lawmakers are focused on harmonizing key cyber regulations, including CISA’s proposed incident reporting rule and HHS’ new cyber update to HIPAA. The post Three key federal cyber regulations to watch under Trump first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft 'slowing or pausing' some AI data center projects
item.description: Microsoft said on Wednesday it is "slowing or pausing" some of its data center projects, describing the move as a show of flexibility as the artificial intelligence (AI) industry evolves.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Hackers breach Morocco's social security database in an unprecedented cyberattack
item.description: RABAT, Morocco (AP) — Morocco 's social security agency said troves of data were stolen from its systems in a cyberattack this week that resulted in personal information being leaked on the messaging app Telegram.
item.dc:creator: SAM METZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Apple has few incentives to start making iPhones in US, despite Trump's trade war with China
item.description: President Donald Trump’s administration has been predicting its barrage of tariffs targeting China will push Apple into manufacturing the iPhone in the U.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: OpenAI countersues Elon Musk in legal dispute over ChatGPT maker's business ambitions
item.description: OpenAI is suing Elon Musk for unfair competition and interfering with its business relationships with investors and customers, escalating a legal battle between the ChatGPT maker and the billionaire who helped bankroll the artificial intelligence startup a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump's China tariffs derail push for TikTok deal
item.description: President Trump’s new tariffs on China have thrown a wrench in efforts to negotiate a deal over TikTok’s divestment from its parent company ByteDance, as Washington and Beijing sink deeper into a trade war.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: How Trump's trade war with China will hit tech prices
item.description: President Trump’s escalating trade war with China is putting a spotlight on the various technology companies and products poised to feel the ripple effects of the ongoing conflict.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Waymo gets stuck in California Chick-fil-A drive-thru
item.description: Videos showed Chick-fil-A workers standing around the stalled vehicle, which had its hazard lights on.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Microsoft 365: A guide to the updates
item.description: Microsoft 365 (and Office 365) subscribers get more frequent software updates than those who have purchased Office without a subscription, which means subscribers have access to the latest features, security patches, and bug fixes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Scientists genetically engineer wolves with white hair and muscular jaws like the extinct dire wolf
item.description: Three genetically engineered wolves that may resemble extinct dire wolves are trotting, sleeping and howling in an undisclosed secure location in the U.S., according to the company that aims to bring back lost species.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA LARSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump’s AI policy shifts focus to ‘high impact’ use cases
item.description: The White House says a new federal AI policy rejects the Biden administration's “risk-averse” approach, but one former official sees it as a “smart evolution." The post Trump’s AI policy shifts focus to ‘high impact’ use cases first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Riverbed bolsters AIOps platform with predictive and agentic AI
item.description: Riverbed this week unveiled updates to its AIOps and observability platform that the company says will transform how IT organizations manage complex distributed infrastructure and data more efficiently and tame the proliferation of monitoring tools.
item.dc:creator: Network World
